rationale: For a Food Waste Exchange, the standard 'eco-green' feels clinical and cliché. We are opting for a warm, editorial 'Food Photography' aesthetic using Bone White, Terracotta, and Deep Aubergine. This creates a premium, trustworthy, and human-centered experience that balances urgency (expiring food) with community care.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tight font-semibold leading-none text-[#2A1B24]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Wide margins, breathing room, and organic asymmetry.

components.button_primary: bg-[#C85A40] text-white hover:bg-[#A64630] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
components.button_secondary: bg-[#F4EFE6] text-[#2A1B24] border border-[#2A1B24]/10 hover:bg-[#EAE2D3] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-colors
components.button_ghost: text-[#2A1B24] hover:bg-[#2A1B24]/5 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
components.input: bg-white border border-[#2A1B24]/10 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C85A40]/30 focus:border-[#C85A40] w-full text-base
components.badge_urgent: bg-[#D97D3A]/10 text-[#D97D3A] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
components.badge_success: bg-[#6B705C]/10 text-[#6B705C] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
components.stat_card: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 border border-[#2A1B24]/5 flex flex-col gap-2

motion.marquee: slow continuous horizontal scroll for partner logos or impact stats

hero_background.description: Warm, overhead shot of a rustic table with fresh ingredients. Used for marketing landing hero background.

food_produce.description: Fresh organic vegetables in a box. Use for surplus food listing examples.

food_bakery.description: Artisan bread and pastries. Use for bakery surplus listing examples.

community_sharing.description: People sharing/handing over a box of food. Use for recipient/donor connection visual.

reward_coffee.description: A warm cup of latte art coffee. Use for the reward points catalog.

avatar_recipient.description: Friendly person avatar for recipient profile.

impact_nature.description: Earthy plant/nature image for environmental impact dashboard decoration.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic 'eco green leaf' styles. Stick to the Terracotta, Bone White, and Aubergine earthy palette to simulate premium food photography aesthetics.
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto. Apply Cormorant Garamond for main headings and Outfit for UI text.
For the Landing page, utilize generous padding (p-12 to py-32) and bento grids for impact stats.
For the Dashboard (Donor/Recipient/Impact), use the 'Control Room' grid philosophy but with our soft radii (rounded-2xl) and clay-like borders to remain human and not overly clinical.
Use lucide-react for all icons. Keep stroke width to 1.5.
Implement glassmorphism selectively for the sticky navigation header using backdrop-blur-xl and a semi-transparent background.
Ensure all buttons, form inputs, and links have explicit hover, focus, and active states with proper contrast.
Always apply 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
When displaying food listing images, limit height to max-h-[80vh] on mobile and use the gradient overlay if placing text on top of images.
Use Shadcn components for forms, tabs, and tables, but heavily customize them to remove the default Vercel-like appearance. Override standard radii with rounded-2xl where appropriate.
